task_completion.description: Navigate to Camp Nou stadium in Barcelona, Spain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map or satellite view shows the Camp Nou stadium.

task_completion.description: Create placemarks named 'NW Corner', 'NE Corner', 'SW Corner', and 'SE Corner' at the field corners.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four placemarks are visible on the corners of the playing field, and their labels ('NW Corner', 'NE Corner', 'SW Corner', 'SE Corner') are visible on the map or in the places sidebar.

task_completion.description: Organize the placemarks in a folder called 'Camp Nou Field Survey'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The places sidebar or tree view shows a folder named 'Camp Nou Field Survey' with the four corner placemarks nested inside it.

task_completion.description: Save the folder as a KML file to /home/ga/Documents/camp_nou_survey.kml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal window shows the file 'camp_nou_survey.kml' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create field_measurements.txt with the field length and width.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/field_measurements.txt' containing the lines 'Field Length: [X] meters' and 'Field Width: [Y] meters' (where X and Y are numerical values).

task_completion.description: Include the FIFA compliance status in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file '/home/ga/Documents/field_measurements.txt' contains the line 'FIFA Compliant: YES' or 'FIFA Compliant: NO' based on the measured dimensions.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine mapping/GIS application (e.g., Google Earth) to view the stadium and create the KML data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GUI of a mapping application being used, rather than the agent writing KML code directly in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actually measured the field using the application's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a ruler, line, or measurement tool active on the field within the mapping application.

integrity.description: The agent created the text file using standard tools rather than bypassing the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) being used to write the measurements, or standard terminal commands being executed.
